case_title: MELODY CHIU et al VS. ANGEL FERNANDO SAJCHE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-24-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
